stemHtml: An aircraft is flying towards Bern city and is instructed to contact the tower. What is the station’s call sign?

options.a: Bern tower, since the call sign consists of a place and service unit available.
options.b: Tower, when the commander is not sure about the place of the service.
options.c: Nothing when the captain is unsure about the name.
options.d: Bern, since only a name of the station is required.
